sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30685" key="e)dh/doka" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐδήδοκα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐδήδεσμαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐδήδοται</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐδηδώς</orth>, <sense id="n30685.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔδω, ἐσθίω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
